journeys.name: Cross-hive isolation
journeys.desc: hive A write → hive B denied (security E2E)

AU.evidence: v_logbook_truth scoped to own hive shows the row (=1)

S.evidence: other hive cannot see the row (cross=0); its open-jobs unchanged (19→19)

L.evidence: wh_traces carries journey/J1 (status=200) scoped to own hive (own=1); invisible to other hive (cross=0)

F.evidence: rendered tile == DB canonical on hive.html (Playwright+postgres; vaxis_render_proofs.json[J1])

C.evidence: Companion grounded answer proven (FAB≈0.5%/DEFL≈0% companion arc) [.last-companion-gate-pass, grounded_sweep_locks.json]

RL.evidence: over-cap solo bucket → HTTP 429 scope=solo (token-free 429, pre-LLM); neighbor bucket untouched (7=7, per-identity isolation); deny path no-increment (victim=999)

LB.evidence: live burst 200 req (8 concurrent) → 224 rps, p95 46ms (SLO<2000), err 0.00% (SLO<1%)
